mapper.update: UPDATE red_packet_info SET red_packet_id = #{redPacketId}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, total_packet = #{totalPacket}, remaining_amount = #{remainingAmount}, remaining_packet = #{remainingPacket}, uid = #{uid}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE red_packet_info SET red_packet_id = #{redPacketId}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, total_packet = #{totalPacket}, remaining_amount = #{remainingAmount}, remaining_packet = #{remainingPacket}, uid = #{uid}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO red_packet_info ( id, red_packet_id, total_amount, total_packet, remaining_amount, remaining_packet, uid, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{redPacketId}, #{totalAmount}, #{totalPacket}, #{remainingAmount}, #{remainingPacket}, #{uid}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
